The '''Bulq family''' was a wealthy [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] family from [[Ruul (moon)|Ruul]], a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]], which they also owned. [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Sora Bulq/Legends|Sora Bulq]] was a member of this family.
